question: The next mainline 3D Mario game will cost $69+
resolution_criteria:
Nintendo might like to go for the $70 price tag from other consoles for their AAA games. So far, only Zelda dared to.

I'm giving a little slack because $69 would be equivalent.

Resolves YES if the next mainline 3D Mario game costs more than $68 in the US. An announcement from Nintendo is sufficient to resolve this.

Resolves NO if it costs $68 or less.

Close date might be extended.
